phone_presence_notes: Used the customer's name once at the top and was friendly, but the call shifted to a purely informational cadence with no warmth-building moments afterward.
top_strength: Thorough confident pricing — walked through variable day-of-week rates, travel charges, packing estimate, and damage coverage.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass skipped on large two-day pack-and-move — prep speech especially valuable for reducing move-day chaos.
